name.full: RepAI Meeting Delegate and Teams Call MVP

description.short: A Copilot delegate agent with a Teams call component.
description.full: RepAI is built by Jeremiah Adetoro for the Microsoft 365 Enterprise Agents hackathon. It installs one app with a Copilot delegate agent and a Teams calling component: RepAI Lite controls the synthetic demo connection and delegate workflow, while RepAI Call connects Copilot actions and Teams calling events to the live Azure backend.

commands.title: Use demo connection
commands.description: Load RepAI's synthetic hackathon work context.

commands.title: Start Teams call
commands.description: Ask RepAI to join the configured Teams meeting as Jeremiah's disclosed delegate.
